title: Settings
description: Manage your account preferences, display options, default data source, and notification settings. Changes are saved per user and persist across sessions.
tips: Set a default data source so that data explorer, cohort builder, and patient profiles all open with your preferred CDM.
Display preferences such as date format and timezone affect how clinical dates appear throughout the application.
Change your password using the Security section if you were assigned a temporary password.
Notification settings control which in-app and email alerts you receive for job completions and study updates.
